_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Heaven-Defying Bead Discovery. Canon event: Wang Lin finds the Heaven-Defying Bead in a dead bird under a cliff as a youth. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Heaven-Defying Bead Discovery
canon_event: Wang Lin finds the Heaven-Defying Bead in a dead bird under a cliff as a youth
why_untaken: The bead is hidden in a dead bird under a cliff; requires specific luck/perception to find.
natural_next_event: Wang Lin (or player) discovers the bead and begins their journey.

karmic_weight.description: The Heaven-Defying Bead is the single most karma-laden object in Wang Lin's journey. Its discovery triggers the entire chain of events.

consequences.description: Wang Lin's cultivation speed increases dramatically
Teng Family attempts to steal the bead, leading to their destruction
